fix: The merge + (automation-merge-insert) used to sit RIGHT AT the closure corner (arms cornered into the central trunk at the same y the + anchored on; no line above it). Fixed in 3 parts: (1) close-knee jog — a populated arm's leaf->join next edge (offset into a multi-parent join) is flagged closeKnee in computeEdges and rendered as a bottom-knee jog whose single crossing sits at the MIDDLE of the drop (midCrossingY) instead of low, so BOTH legs are tall: the UPPER leg at from.x (the arm's own column, where the arm edge + stays + where an inserted node still stacks) AND the LOWER leg at to.x=join.x (the central vertical the merge + uses). (2) into-join room — computeJoinDrops adds JOIN_MERGE_DROP=56px to the join's OWN row (the closure->join descent), stacking before the existing below-join JOIN_EXTRA_DROP=48px, so the central run is tall enough for gap-above + (+) + gap-below. (3) merge + on the run middle — new mergeAnchor(edges,positions,joinId) finds the close-knee edge landing on the join column and anchors the + at the MIDDLE of its lower run (closeKneeLowerRun), returning closureCornerY strictly above the +; AutomationCanvas uses it instead of the old contPos.y-14. Falls back to just-above-the-join for a fully-empty diamond. Preserves compact single-knee branches (v0.41.6), straight single-out trunk + below-join room (v0.41.7), down-only/axis-aligned/rounded/convergence/MIN_SEGMENT, and distinct empty-arm +s.
e2eSummary: SOLO playwright runs (pkill + ports 8788/5174 freed before each; one process at a time). automation-builder.browser.e2e.spec.ts: 19/19 passed incl. new 'the merge + sits on a VISIBLE vertical line' test (merge + y strictly below the arm-closure corner and strictly above the join card top) and the previously-failing 'compact straight columns / 2nd node stays in column' + 'empty passthrough' tests. node-editors + list-detail + list-no-overflow + canvas-pan-zoom: 21/21 passed. publish-gate + versioning + lifecycle + journey-smoke: 7/7 passed. Total 47 automation e2e green.
notes: Unit: web automations 138/138 pass (layout.test.ts 33 + orthogonal-path.test.ts 16 include the new merge-spacing assertions). Lint: only the 7 known pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps 'rule not found' errors remain (allowed exception); no new lint errors. Version bumped 0.41.7 -> 0.41.8; CLAUDE.md updated with the v0.41.8 bullet. NOT committed/pushed (orchestrator commits). New exports: orthogonal-path.ts closeKneeLowerRun + closeKnee param on orthogonalPath/verticalAnchor; layout.ts mergeAnchor + LayoutEdge.closeKnee + JOIN_MERGE_DROP. Earlier dead-end (top-knee closing edge) was reverted because it moved the closing arm's long run + arm-+ to join.x, breaking the 'inserted 2nd node stays in the arm's column' contract; the close-knee mid-crossing approach keeps the arm + on from.x while giving the merge + the tall lower run.
